TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Hbun_kramay, title = Hbun_kramay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hbun_kramay} }

S.FORM: Hbun kramay Itiniay i Jianshi Cen no Hsinchu ko Hbun kramay a niyaro', 109 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 386 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 93% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 359 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 7% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 27 ko tamdaw.
S.PHON: ħb~b~vo~u~un kramaj itiniaj i *iansħi ʦən no~u ħsinʦħo~u~u ko~u ħb~b~vo~u~un kramaj a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.FORM: Hbun kramay Itiniay i Jianshi Cen no Hsinchu ko Hbun kramay a niyaro', 109 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 386 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 93% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 359 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 7% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 27 ko tamdaw.
S.PHON: ħb~b~vo~u~un kramaj itiniaj i *iansħi ʦən no~u ħsinʦħo~u~u ko~u ħb~b~vo~u~un kramaj a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw.
